creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ashish SHUKLA from comment #8)

Also were you able to try this `truss` ?

As far as I can tell, there are two problems, 1) where `find-attributes` returned "Too many links" error (main-n246034-e6ab1e365c), and 2) where it returned nil (main-n249811-a36230f75e0).

Thanks in advance
